name: Quick Pigs-in-a-Blanket
recipeIngredient: 1 small head cabbage, cut into medium pieces
1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese or grated Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop cabbage into medium size pieces and spread in a 9x13" pan.
2. Brown ground beef and onion together. Drain any excess fat.
3. Stir in rice, salt, and pepper. Spoon the mixture over the cabbage.
4. Heat tomato soup with water until hot. Pour evenly over all ingredients.
5. Sprinkle grated cheese on top. Cover with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
7. After baking, fluff the mixture with a fork.
8. Alternatively, you can microwave on High for 20-30 minutes, covered with plastic wrap.
